name: mkt-test
description: Personal Claude Code plugins marketplace — testing ground for forking, customizing and publishing plugins.

plugins.name: mr-auto-review
plugins.description: Multi-agent MR reviewer: dispatches specialist reviewer agents in parallel and triages findings into a single human-facing report. Originally built for the Wetaca monorepo.

plugins.name: clean-code-ts
plugins.description: TypeScript clean-code architecture skill — finds shallow modules and proposes deepening refactors with TS-specific interface idioms (discriminated unions, branded types, narrowing, ports as TS interfaces). Curated from Matt Pocock's improve-codebase-architecture via dmedina-dev/dev-forge.
